releaseNotes: v0.29.2 — Reports screen reliability fix. Before this release, if an export or import on the Reports screen ran into an unexpected error (disk full, permission denied, etc.), the spinner would just disappear with no feedback — looking exactly like a successful action that produced no file. v0.29.2 wraps every Reports action in proper error handling. Failures now surface as a SnackBar with the operation name + the underlying error, e.g. 'Reorder report export failed: No space left on device'. No behavioral change on the happy path. No schema migration. Auto-updater will roll v0.29.1 → v0.29.2 on next launch. 594 tests passing.
